title: Reading events
description: The reader-engagement log — one row per open/save/dismiss/dwell — that drives feed personalization.

articleId.description: the article the event is about (kept when the article is deleted -> set null)

dwellMs.description: milliseconds the reader spent on the article (for 'dwell' events)

tag.description: denormalized primary topic tag, so the personalizer needn't re-join to the article

article.description: the article this engagement event is about
